title: Ensure that Sways cannot be shared with people outside of your organization
remediation:
To ensure Sways cannot be viewed outside of your organization:

  1. Navigate to Microsoft 365 admin center https://admin.microsoft.com.
  2. Click to expand Settings then select Org settings.
  3. Under Services select Sway and block Let people in your organization share their sways with people outside your organization.
  4. Click Save.
remediationImpact: Interactive reports, presentations, newsletters and other items created in Sway will not be shared outside the organization by users.
